sentences.target: On dort dans la tente ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ dɔʁ dɑ̃ la tɑ̃t sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: On dort dans la tente ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ dɔʁ dɑ̃ la tɑ̃t sə swaʁ/
translations.en: We're sleeping in the tent tonight.
translations.es: Esta noche dormimos en la tienda de campaña.
translations.de: Wir schlafen heute Nacht im Zelt.
translations.yue: 我哋今晚喺帳篷入面瞓覺。
translations.ru: Сегодня ночью мы спим в палатке.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite vamos dormir na tenda.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng tôi ngủ trong lều.
translations.nl: Vanavond slapen we in de tent.
translations.uk: Сьогодні вночі ми спимо в наметі.
translations.hi: आज रात हम तंबू में सोएँगे.
translations.pl: Dziś w nocy śpimy w namiocie.
translations.nb: I natt sover vi i teltet.
translations.id: Malam ini kami tidur di tenda.
translations.sv: I natt sover vi i tältet.
translations.ro: În noaptea asta dormim în cort.
translations.da: I nat sover vi i teltet.
translations.ja: 今夜はテントで寝ます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, impersonal/colloquial ‘we/one’; takes 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd singular of ‘dormir’.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular, agreeing with ‘tente’.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the NP inside the PP ‘dans la tente’.
Demonstrative determiner modifying the temporal noun ‘soir’.
Common noun, masculine singular; temporal complement (‘ce soir’).

sentences.target: Je range ma tente dans le garage.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʁɑ̃ʒ ma tɑ̃t dɑ̃ lə ɡaʁaʒ/

translations.fr: Je range ma tente dans le garage.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʁɑ̃ʒ ma tɑ̃t dɑ̃ lə ɡaʁaʒ/
translations.en: I'm putting my tent away in the garage.
translations.es: Guardo mi tienda de campaña en el garaje.
translations.de: Ich verstaue mein Zelt in der Garage.
translations.it: Ripongo la mia tenda in garage.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把我的帐篷收起来放在车库里。
translations.yue: 我將我嘅帳篷執好擺喺車庫。
translations.ru: Я убираю свою палатку в гараж.
translations.pt: Guardo a minha tenda na garagem.
translations.he: אני מאחסן את האוהל שלי במוסך.
translations.vi: Tôi cất lều của mình trong nhà để xe.
translations.nl: Ik berg mijn tent op in de garage.
translations.uk: Я складаю свій намет у гаражі.
translations.hi: मैं अपना तंबू गैरेज में रख रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Μαζεύω τη σκηνή μου στο γκαράζ.
translations.nb: Jeg rydder bort teltet mitt i garasjen.
translations.id: Saya menyimpan tenda saya di garasi.
translations.sv: Jag ställer undan mitt tält i garaget.
translations.da: Jeg pakker mit telt væk i garagen.
translations.ja: テントをガレージに片付けます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 1st singular of ‘ranger’.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular possessor; feminine singular agreeing with ‘tente’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘range’.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular, agreeing with ‘garage’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘dans’.

sentences.target: Tu montes une tente avec moi.

translations.fr: Tu montes une tente avec moi.
translations.en: Are you setting up a tent with me?
translations.es: Monta una tienda de campaña conmigo.
translations.de: Bau ein Zelt mit mir auf.
translations.vi: Dựng một cái lều với tôi.
translations.nl: Zet een tent op met mij.
translations.nb: Sett opp et telt sammen med meg.
translations.sv: Sätt upp ett tält med mig.
translations.ro: Instalează un cort împreună cu mine.
translations.da: Sæt et telt op sammen med mig.
translations.ja: 私と一緒にテントを張ってください。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd singular of ‘monter’.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing ‘tente’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘montes’.
Preposition marking a comitative complement.
Stressed personal pronoun, 1st person singular; object of ‘avec’.

sentences.target: Peux-tu vérifier la tente avant la pluie.
sentences.reading: /pø ty veʁifje la tɑ̃t avɑ̃ la plɥi/

translations.fr: Peux-tu vérifier la tente avant la pluie.
translations.ipa: /pø ty veʁifje la tɑ̃t avɑ̃ la plɥi/
translations.en: Can you check the tent before the rain?
translations.es: Por favor, revisa la tienda de campaña antes de que llueva.
translations.de: Bitte überprüfe das Zelt, bevor es regnet.
translations.it: Per favore, controlla la tenda prima che piova.
translations.ko: 비 오기 전에 텐트를 확인해 주세요.
translations.zh-Hans: 下雨前请检查一下帐篷。
translations.yue: 落雨前請檢查吓個帳篷。
translations.pt: Por favor, verifica a tenda antes que chova.
translations.he: בבקשה בדוק את האוהל לפני הגשם.
translations.tr: Lütfen yağmurdan önce çadırı kontrol et.
translations.vi: Vui lòng kiểm tra lều trước khi trời mưa.
translations.ar: من فضلك افحص الخيمة قبل المطر.
translations.nl: Controleer alsjeblieft de tent voordat het gaat regenen.
translations.uk: Будь ласка, перевір намет перед дощем.
translations.hu: Kérlek, ellenőrizd a sátrat az eső előtt.
translations.hi: कृपया बारिश से पहले तंबू की जाँच कर लो.
translations.el: Παρακαλώ έλεγξε τη σκηνή πριν από τη βροχή.
translations.nb: Vennligst sjekk teltet før det begynner å regne.
translations.id: Tolong periksa tenda sebelum hujan turun.
translations.sv: Kontrollera tältet innan det börjar regna.
translations.ro: Te rog, verifică cortul înainte de ploaie.
translations.da: Tjek venligst teltet, før det begynder at regne.
translations.fi: Tarkista teltta ennen kuin alkaa sataa.
translations.ja: 雨が降る前にテントを確認してください。

tokens.explanation: Modal auxiliary, present indicative 2nd singular of ‘pouvoir’ with enclitic inverted subject ‘tu’.
Lexical verb in the infinitive; complement of the modal ‘pouvoir’.
Definite article, feminine singular, agreeing with ‘tente’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘vérifier’.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, agreeing with ‘pluie’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘avant’.
